properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Brokenness has brought me to my knees Face to face with all that's dark in me I can barely see You through my shame Jesus come and wash me white again

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Flood me with Your healing light Help me choose what's true and right

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Give me an undivided heart I want to love You with every part Give me an undivided soul I want to be Yours alone Yours alone

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: At the cross I find Your open arms Reminding me there's grace for all I've done With Your blood You wipe away my past Taking on Yourself my sin and scars

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: By Your power help me change Break off every single chain

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: You make all things new So take my ashes and make them something beautiful Do what only You can do Take my ashes and make them something beautiful
